title: FerrFlow Fixture Definition
description: Declarative definition for generating a git fixture repository.

$schema.description: JSON Schema reference for editor support.

name.description: Unique identifier for this fixture (used as directory name).

description.description: Human-readable description of the scenario. Copied into .expect.toml.

default_branch.description: Default branch name for the generated repo. Defaults to git's init.defaultBranch.

config.description: FerrFlow configuration file to place in the generated repo.

content.description: Raw content of the config file.

format.description: Config file format. Determines the default filename if 'filename' is not set.

filename.description: Explicit filename for the config file. Overrides the format-derived default.

packages.description: Packages to set up in the generated repo.

path.description: Relative path to the package directory. Use '.' for root-level packages.

tag.description: Tag to create on the initial setup commit for this package.

commits.description: Commits to create on the default branch after initial setup.

tags.description: Tags to create at specific commit positions.

at_commit.description: Index into the 'commits' array. Use -1 for the initial setup commit.

branches.description: Branches to create from specific points.

from.description: Source branch to fork from. Defaults to the default branch.

at_commit.description: Commit index to branch from (-1 = initial setup). If omitted, branches from the tip of 'from'.

commits.description: Commits to add on this branch.

merge.description: If set, creates a merge commit back into the named branch after all commits are added.

hooks.description: Hook scripts to place in the generated repo.

path.description: Relative path for the hook file (e.g. 'hooks/pre-bump.sh').

generate.description: Bulk generation mode. Creates synthetic commits without listing them individually.

packages.description: Number of packages to generate (1 = single-package repo).

commits.description: Number of synthetic commits to generate.

expect.description: Expected output assertions. Written to .expect.toml for consumer test runners.

check_contains.description: Strings that must appear in the consumer's output.

check_not_contains.description: Strings that must not appear in the consumer's output.

output_order.description: Strings that must appear in order in the consumer's output.

message.description: Commit message (should follow Conventional Commits format).

files.description: Files to create/modify in this commit.

merge.description: If true, creates a merge commit instead of a regular commit.
